title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: Nishi takes control of Hari Pandit's mind in an attempt to get to Tara. When Hari Pandit arrives at the house, he falls unconscious upon entering the temple and Nishi loses control over him. Will he remember what Nishi did to him?

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.

subTitle: Following the cessation of the Kurukshetra War, Lord Krishna arrives in Dwarka to find turmoil and disarray. He then strives to re-establish harmony and faith.
